tools.name: Create vendor record
tools.description: Adds a supplier or payee to the vendor master.

tools.name: Approve payment
tools.description: Authorizes a queued payment for release.

tools.name: Add employee
tools.description: Creates an employee record in the people system.

tools.name: Run payroll
tools.description: Starts a payroll calculation and payment run.

tools.name: Request application access
tools.description: Submits an access request for an employee.

tools.name: Grant application access
tools.description: Assigns a requested application role to an employee.

tools.name: Read analytics database
tools.description: Runs read-only queries against the analytics database.

tools.name: Delete database records
tools.description: Permanently removes selected records from the analytics database.

tools.name: Export data
tools.description: Exports selected analytics data to a file.

tools.name: Read customer profile details
tools.description: Retrieves customer contact and account information for a support case.

tools.name: Send email outside the company
tools.description: Delivers an email to an address outside the organization.

tools.name: Read internal knowledge base
tools.description: Searches and retrieves approved internal knowledge articles.

tools.name: Read retired product archive
tools.description: Retrieves documents from the retired product archive.

tools.name: Read CRM account context
tools.description: Retrieves sales account notes and opportunity context.

tools.name: Draft customer email
tools.description: Creates a message draft for a sales representative to review and send.

tools.name: Read inventory
tools.description: Retrieves current warehouse inventory and stock counts.

tools.name: Update inventory count
tools.description: Updates a warehouse stock count after reconciliation.

tools.name: Read policy library
tools.description: Retrieves published company policy documents.

tools.name: Create audit ticket
tools.description: Opens a follow-up item for an audit reviewer.

tools.name: Read analytics extract
tools.description: Retrieves an approved analytics extract for review.

tools.name: Validate data rules
tools.description: Checks an analytics extract against defined quality rules.

tools.name: Create travel request
tools.description: Creates a travel request for later manager review.

tools.name: Read contract repository
tools.description: Retrieves approved contract templates and prior agreements.

tools.name: Draft contract language
tools.description: Prepares contract wording for legal review.

tools.name: Read team calendar
tools.description: Retrieves availability from internal team calendars.

tools.name: Create internal calendar event
tools.description: Creates an internal meeting hold on selected calendars.

tools.name: Read source repository
tools.description: Retrieves source files and issue context from an engineering repository.

tools.name: Create engineering issue
tools.description: Opens a work item for an engineering maintainer.

tools.name: Read service metrics
tools.description: Retrieves current service health and performance metrics.

tools.name: Create incident ticket
tools.description: Opens an incident ticket for the on-call team.

tools.name: Create onboarding checklist
tools.description: Creates a standard internal checklist for a new hire.

tools.name: Send internal message
tools.description: Sends a reminder through the company internal messaging system.

tools.name: Search public web
tools.description: Searches publicly available web pages.

tools.name: Summarize document
tools.description: Produces a concise summary of a supplied non-confidential document.
